docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,017.51 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA BECERRIL, ERICK ADIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-01-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA BECERRIL, ERICK ADIR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ERICK ADIR RIVERIA BECERRIL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA BECERRIL, ERICK ADIR $1,017.51 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,097.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
